arts.ttl: Carlos Alcaraz: World number one has 'missed clay' after reaching semi-finals with win over Arthur Fils
arts.sum: World number three Alcaraz saved three break points in the 11th game of the second set in a thrilling tussle with 20-year-old Fils. Alcaraz managed to draw level at 4-4, only for Fils to break once more and then hold serve to take the set as he saved two break points.

arts.ttl: Forest want to create new history - Elanga
arts.sum: Dion Dublin speaks with winger Anthony Elanga to discuss Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo and how he has got them "chasing greatness" this season.

arts.ttl: David Moyes tips Nottingham Forest boss Nuno Espirito Santo for major honour
arts.sum: It goes against who usually wins it...

arts.ttl: Team News: Nottingham Forest vs. Everton injury, suspension list, predicted XIs
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up all of the latest injury and suspension news ahead of Saturday's Premier League clash between Nottingham Forest and Everton.

arts.ttl: Nottingham Forest could be without four key players for Everton as Nuno admits struggle
arts.sum: The latest from the Nottingham Forest camp ahead of their Premier League match at home to Everton on Saturday

arts.ttl: Report: Nottingham Forest want to bring £42m star back to the Premier League, he's been made available
arts.sum: He excelled in the Premier League...

arts.ttl: Man City transfer news: Morgan Gibbs-White asking price revealed as Nottingham Forest 'demand nine-figure fee'
arts.sum: Nottingham Forest will reportedly demand a nine-figure fee for Manchester City-linked midfielder Morgan Gibbs-White this summer.

arts.ttl: David Moyes offers Everton injury update and makes worrying Jesper Lindstrom admission
arts.sum: Jesper Lindstrom has had surgery on his hernia and the Denmark winger, who joined Everton on loan from Napoli in the summer, may have played his last game for the Goodison Park club

arts.ttl: David Moyes makes new Premier League admission for Everton to reveal plans for next season
arts.sum: David Moyes was brought in by Everton in January to keep them in the Premier League and the Blues boss has given his thoughts on the relegation struggle ahead of the final run-in

arts.ttl: Three sentences in 14 minutes summed up growing Everton confidence - along with another sign
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas with the latest from Finch Farm after David Moyes' pre-Nottingham Forest press conference
